body: Thanks for the follow-up, [Anna](people/anna-petrov) — really appreciated your notes from our call last week. I've been thinking more about the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) deal flow conversation and wanted to share that we've seen a notable uptick in inbound from climate infrastructure founders this quarter, which feels aligned with everything you flagged about the energy transition tailwinds. A handful of the seed-stage companies we're tracking are doing genuinely interesting work at the intersection of grid optimization and ML, and I'd love to get your read on a couple of them when you have bandwidth. Would you be open to a 30-minute sync sometime the week of October 6th? Even a quick async voice note with your initial reaction would be enormously helpful as I'm building out conviction on one deal in particular. As always, grateful for your perspective on this — it's been invaluable as I've grown into this seat.
